title: Yanar Mohammed, 65, Iraqi Women’s Rights Advocate, Is Killed by Gunmen
summary_full: She established a network of safe houses for abused women and was an outspoken critic of her country’s repressive institutions, despite the constant threat of violence.
summary_public: She established a network of safe houses for abused women and was an outspoken critic of her country’s repressive institutions, despite the constant threat of violence.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: Iraqi Women’s Rights Advocate, Is Killed by Gunmen
